name: Pradhan Mantri Kisan Samman Nidhi (PM-KISAN)
description: Income support scheme providing ₹6000 per year to all landholding farmer families across India in three equal installments of ₹2000 each.
application_process: Online through PM-KISAN portal or nearest CSC

name: Ayushman Bharat - Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana (PM-JAY)
description: World's largest health insurance scheme providing free health coverage of ₹5 lakh per family per year for secondary and tertiary care hospitalization.
benefit: ₹5 lakh health coverage per family per year

eligibility.income: Below Poverty Line or SECC beneficiaries

application_process: Visit nearest Ayushman Mitra or empanelled hospital
states: All India except Delhi, Odisha, Telangana (have own schemes)

name: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana - Gramin (PMAY-G)
description: Provides financial assistance to rural poor for construction of pucca houses with basic amenities.

eligibility.housing: Houseless or living in kutcha house

application_process: Through Gram Panchayat or online at pmayg.nic.in

name: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana
description: Small savings scheme for girl child providing attractive interest rate and tax benefits for education and marriage expenses.
application_process: Visit nearest Post Office or authorized bank

name: Pradhan Mantri MUDRA Yojana (PMMY)
description: Provides loans up to ₹10 lakh to non-corporate, non-farm small/micro enterprises for income generating activities.

eligibility.business: Small/micro enterprises, traders, manufacturers, service providers

application_process: Apply at nearest bank, NBFC, or MFI

name: Pradhan Mantri Shram Yogi Maan-Dhan (PM-SYM)
description: Pension scheme for unorganized workers providing assured monthly pension of ₹3000 after 60 years of age.
application_process: Through CSC or online at maandhan.in

name: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana (PMFBY)
description: Crop insurance scheme providing financial support to farmers in case of crop failure due to natural calamities.
benefit: Insurance coverage for crop loss, Premium: 2% (Kharif), 1.5% (Rabi)

eligibility.crops: Food crops, oilseeds, annual commercial/horticultural crops

application_process: Through banks, CSCs, or insurance companies

name: Prime Minister's Employment Generation Programme (PMEGP)
description: Credit-linked subsidy program for setting up new micro-enterprises in non-farm sector.
benefit: Subsidy: 15-35% of project cost (up to ₹25 lakh manufacturing, ₹10 lakh services)

eligibility.income: No income limit for general category

name: National Social Assistance Programme (NSAP)
description: Provides financial assistance to elderly, widows, and persons with disabilities from BPL families.
benefit: ₹200-500 per month (varies by state and category)
application_process: Through local Panchayat or Municipal office

name: Pradhan Mantri Ujjwala Yojana (PMUY)
description: Provides free LPG connections to women from BPL households to promote clean cooking fuel.
benefit: Free LPG connection + ₹1600 support for first refill

exclusions: Already has LPG connection in household
